name: Almond Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Spread almonds on a small baking sheet.
Place in oven and toast for 6-8 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove and let cool. Coarsely chop toasted almonds.
2. In a medium bowl, beat eggs with an electric mixer on high speed until fluffy. Gradually beat in almond extract and sugar until the mixture is thick and lemon-colored. Scrape down the sides of the bowl frequently. With a rubber spatula, fold in cake flour mixed with baking powder and salt just until thoroughly combined. Fold in chopped toasted almonds.
3. Grease two 10 x 4 inch baking sheets. Spoon half of the almond mixture onto the center of each sheet to form a log that is 3 x 10 inches. Bake for 30 minutes. Remove from oven. Leave oven on.
4. Let cookies cool on sheets for 3-5 minutes, or until they are cool enough to handle. With a serrated knife, cut each log diagonally into 12 slices. Place slices, flat sides down, onto the baking sheets and return to oven. Bake an additional 5-7 minutes, or until golden on both sides. Remove to racks and let cool completely. Store in a tightly covered container.
